title: 1 Heart Challenge
description: This project makes it so that if you have it installed, you will be limited to 1 full heart.
body: This is a simple mod that limits each players health to only one single heart (2 hp). This mod is only required for the server to have (if you are playing on a server) each of the players does not need it. If you are playing singleplayer you do need to have it installed for it to work of course.
